mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MARKET.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO market ( PRODUCT_ID, SELLER_ID, CLASS_NAME, PRODUCT_NAME, PRICE, DELIVERY_FEE, STOCK, PRODUCT_DESC, PRODUCT_STATUS, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{sellerId}, #{className}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{deliveryFee}, #{stock}, #{productDesc, jdbcType=CLOB}, 'ON_SALE', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT m.PRODUCT_ID as productId, m.SELLER_ID as sellerId, m.CLASS_NAME as className, m.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, m.PRICE as price, m.DELIVERY_FEE as deliveryFee, m.STOCK as stock, m.PRODUCT_STATUS as productStatus, m.REG_DATE as regDate, (SELECT file_name FROM product_image WHERE product_id = m.product_id AND is_main = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) as thumbnailName FROM market m ORDER BY m.PRODUCT_ID DESC

SELECT m.PRODUCT_ID as productId, m.SELLER_ID as sellerId, m.CLASS_NAME as className, m.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, m.PRICE as price, m.DELIVERY_FEE as deliveryFee, m.STOCK as stock, m.PRODUCT_STATUS as productStatus, m.REG_DATE as regDate, (SELECT file_name FROM product_image WHERE product_id = m.product_id AND is_main = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) as thumbnailName FROM market m WHERE m.CLASS_NAME = #{className} ORDER BY m.PRODUCT_ID DESC

SELECT m.PRODUCT_ID as productId, m.SELLER_ID as sellerId, m.CLASS_NAME as className, m.PRODUCT_NAME as productName, m.PRICE as price, m.DELIVERY_FEE as deliveryFee, m.STOCK as stock, m.PRODUCT_STATUS as productStatus, m.REG_DATE as regDate, (SELECT file_name FROM product_image WHERE product_id = m.product_id AND is_main = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) as thumbnailName FROM market m
AND m.CLASS_NAME = #{className}
AND (m.PRODUCT_NAME LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%' OR m.PRODUCT_DESC LIKE '%' || #{word} || '%')
ORDER BY m.PRODUCT_ID DESC

SELECT PRODUCT_ID as productId, SELLER_ID as sellerId, CLASS_NAME as className, PRODUCT_NAME as productName, PRICE as price, DELIVERY_FEE as deliveryFee, STOCK as stock, PRODUCT_DESC as productDesc, PRODUCT_STATUS as productStatus, REG_DATE as regDate FROM market WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE market SET CLASS_NAME = #{className}, PRODUCT_NAME = #{productName}, PRICE = #{price}, DELIVERY_FEE = #{deliveryFee}, STOCK = #{stock}, PRODUCT_DESC = #{productDesc, jdbcType=CLOB} WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_MARKET_ORDER.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO market_order ( ORDER_ID, MEMBERNO, USER_ID, TOTAL_PRICE, PAYMENT_METHOD, RECEIVER_NAME, RECEIVER_TEL, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS1, ADDRESS2, ORDER_DATE ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{memberno}, #{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{paymentMethod}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverTel}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE market SET PRODUCT_STATUS = 'SOLD_OUT' WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId} AND STOCK = 0
